---
title: "Alberto Mariola"
image: "img/avatar_sq.png"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/alberto-mariola-449b91160/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/langestroop"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/langestroop"
  - label: Email
    url: "langestroop@protonmail.ch"
  - label: Scholar
    url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=93msY9YAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao"
output:
  postcards::jolla
---
I am a [Sussex Neuroscience][sussex_neuro] PhD candidate working at the [Sackler Centre for Consciousness Science][sackler].


[sussex_neuro]: https://www.sussex.ac.uk/research/centres/sussex-neuroscience/phd/4yearphd
[sackler]: http://www.sussex.ac.uk/sackler/
